description_long: This object appears to be a distorted and incomplete representation of an adult pedestrian, with significant mesh and texture artifacts. The form is elongated and stretched, with some body parts, such as the head, faintly visible and other limbs or features either missing or merged into abstract, angular extensions. The surface is mostly smooth with some irregularities, and the overall structure lacks clear anatomical detail. The head is the most recognizable human feature, while the rest of the body is obscured by stretched polygons and broken geometry. The asset does not display any clear clothing details or accessories, and the posture is indeterminate due to the severe mesh deformation. The object is not functional as a realistic human figure and would be confusing in an urban context.
description: A highly distorted, incomplete adult pedestrian figure with a visible head and abstract, stretched body parts. The mesh is broken and lacks clear anatomical or clothing details.
description_view_0: This view shows a long, stretched form with angular extensions and a faintly visible head, with most body features obscured.
description_view_1: The side angle reveals the elongated, flat surfaces and the lack of clear limb definition, with the head barely visible.
description_view_2: This perspective highlights the abstract, angular extensions and the absence of recognizable human features except for some surface contours.
description_view_3: The head is most visible in this view, but the rest of the body remains distorted and merged with stretched polygons.
